items.title: INS Mahendragiri commissioned; Defence Minister says future wars will still be won by resolve and soldiers, not just AI
items.summary: “Future wars may be fought with Artificial Intelligence, but they will still be won by national resolve, trained soldiers, and credible military power,” Mr. Rajnath Singh remarked
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Iran’s Top Diplomat in Oman for Talks on Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The Iranian foreign minister landed in Muscat on Saturday. A standoff over the strait this week set off heavy clashes between the U.S. and Iran.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Heatwave to stretch into second week despite cooler air for some this weekend
items.summary: The sizzling heat continues into next week despite a drop in temperatures over the weekend.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.
